_comment: Explicit, reversible content-exclusion list for the built KB. Entries listed here are left OUT of data/kb/ entirely by ingest_notes.py — they never enter the companion. This does NOT modify the original notes (the pipeline only reads them); exclusion is fully reversible by removing an item here and re-ingesting. Match is by entry `id` OR by source-relative `file` path (either is sufficient), so a slug change on one side won't silently un-exclude a page. Keep `reason` short — it is surfaced in the exclusion report.

exclude.reason: Root table-of-contents / navigation page — only child-page links and intro boilerplate, no technique content.

exclude.file: Exploitation/privilage escalation/win prev esc extra resources 3a0e923e36d480749e36f235b029233b.md
exclude.reason: Dead/outdated Windows privesc tool links; the note's own author annotation says it is very old.
